subcodes.first_line: O thou who art named with the two Most Great Names! Hearken unto the call of the Lord of Names, Who calleth thee from the prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سمیت بالاسمین الاعظمین ان استمع ندآء مالک الاسماء انه ینادیک من سجن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @chastity and purity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
